title: Acilepis dalzelliana
taxonomy: Acilepis dalzelliana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a member of the tribe Gnaphalieae. Acilepis dalzelliana is native to the Western Ghats in India. This plant is often found growing in grasslands and rocky outcrops. Acilepis dalzelliana is typically a small shrub with small white flowers.
